entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: Sri Lankan variety 'Raavana' used as a source for probiotic bacteria

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: The geographical location associated with the finger millet variety

entities.name: LACTIC ACID BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria isolated from fermented finger millet with probiotic potential

entities.name: LACTOCOCCUS LACTIS SUBSP. LACTIS FM_19LAB
entities.description: Specific bacterial strain isolated from Sri Lankan finger millet variety Raavana

entities.name: 16S RRNA GENE
entities.description: Gene used for the identification and sequencing of the bacterial strain

entities.name: PROBIOTIC POTENTIAL
entities.description: The ability of the bacteria to provide health benefits

entities.name: IN VITRO SAFETY
entities.description: The safety profile of the bacteria tested in a laboratory setting

entities.name: EFFICACY
entities.description: The effectiveness of the bacterial strain in producing desired probiotic effects

entities.name: HEMOLYSIS
entities.description: The breakdown of red blood cells, which the isolate did not demonstrate

entities.name: DNASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability to degrade DNA, which the isolate did not demonstrate

entities.name: GELATINE HYDROLYSIS
entities.description: The ability to break down gelatin, which the isolate did not demonstrate

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability to resist antibiotics, which the isolate did not fully acquire

entities.name: ACID TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to survive in acidic environments

entities.name: BILE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to survive in the presence of bile

entities.name: PHENOL TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to survive in the presence of phenol

entities.name: SALT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to survive in high salt concentrations

entities.name: TEMPERATURE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability to survive across a range of temperatures

entities.name: ANTI-MICROBIAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability to inhibit the growth of other microorganisms

entities.name: ANTICANCER ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability to inhibit cancer cell growth

entities.name: ANTI-OXIDANT ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability to inhibit oxidation

entities.name: CHOLESTEROL ASSIMILATION
entities.description: The process of absorbing cholesterol

entities.name: LACTIC ACID PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing lactic acid during fermentation

entities.name: FERMENTATION
entities.description: The metabolic process used to prepare the finger millet and by which the bacteria produce lactic acid
